name: Logility Supply Chain Planning API
what_it_does: Logility Voyager Solutions REST API for supply chain planning, demand management, and inventory optimization. Enables AI agents to manage demand planning and statistical forecasting for supply chain demand automation, handle sales and operations planning (S&OP) workflow for executive supply chain alignment, access inventory optimization and safety stock calculation for multi-echelon inventory management, retrieve supply chain analytics and KPI dashboards for performance monitoring, manage replenishment planning and purchase order generation for procurement automation, handle supplier collaboration and order management for supply network coordination, access manufacturing planning and production scheduling for capacity alignment, retrieve transportation and logistics optimization for distribution network efficiency, manage scenario planning and supply chain risk simulation for resilience, and integrate Logility with SAP, Oracle, JDA, and ERP systems for unified supply chain data.
use_cases: Automating demand forecasts from supply chain planning agents
Running S&OP processes from executive planning agents
Optimizing safety stock from inventory agents
Generating replenishment orders from procurement agents
not_for: Small businesses without multi-echelon supply chain complexity
Organizations without dedicated supply chain planning teams
Simple inventory management without demand variability
best_when: A manufacturer, distributor, or retailer using Logility Voyager wants AI agents to automate demand forecasting, S&OP workflow, inventory optimization, and replenishment planning.
avoid_when: DEMAND FORECAST ACCURACY RISK: Automated replenishment based on inaccurate demand forecasts creates excess inventory or stockouts; statistical forecast models require sufficient historical data and outlier cleaning before automation. S&OP executive alignment — automated S&OP consensus can bypass human judgment on strategic supply chain decisions; executive review gates must be preserved in automated S&OP workflows. New product introduction — automated demand planning for new products without demand history creates unreliable forecasts; NPI requires human-assisted analogous product or market research baseline.

auth.notes: Logility uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ. Founded 1978 (merged with American Software). Public via American Software (AMSWA NASDAQ). Acquired Halo Business Intelligence (2013), Demand Solutions (2019). 1,200+ supply chain customers. Voyager Solutions is the flagship suite. Competes with Kinaxis, o9 Solutions, and Blue Yonder for supply chain planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; per-module and per-user pricing
pricing.notes: Atlanta, Georgia. AMSWA NASDAQ subsidiary. Founded 1978. 1,200+ customers. Supply chain planning specialist. Voyager Solutions flagship product. Competes with Kinaxis and Blue Yonder.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: DEMAND FORECAST ACCURACY: Automated replenishment based on poor demand forecasts creates stockouts or excess inventory; statistical models require sufficient history (24+ months) and outlier treatment before full automation
S&OP human override requirement — automated S&OP consensus workflows must preserve executive override gates; supply chain decisions with major financial impact require human review before execution

New product introduction — NPI demand planning without historical data requires analogous product mapping or market research baseline; fully automated NPI forecasting creates unreliable replenishment plans
No webhooks — planning run completion and replenishment recommendations require polling; no native push notification for planning event completion
ERP integration sync timing — Logility integrates with SAP/Oracle via batch sync; real-time inventory position updates are not available between sync intervals
American Software acquisition complexity — Logility operates under AMSWA umbrella with Demand Solutions and Halo BI; verify which product API applies to your planning use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain and demand forecast data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain and inventory data.
